subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath sent down the Book in truth. Verily, there is no God but Him, and all things bear witness to His sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی انزل الکتاب بالحق انه ما من اله الا هو یشهد کل شیء بسلطانه
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @wisdom [hikmat], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
